ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Creator of the algorithm */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data instance in bytes */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the instance was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance used in the run */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number of the algorithm on the instance */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the run was executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the run was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "time_s" REAL /* Execution time of the run in seconds */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the run */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the run */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the run */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the run */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Serialized confusion matrix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "configuration_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)
